name: Double Play
overview: Pitcher Tae Hun and catcher Jeong Ho, from a struggling high school baseball team on the brink of disbandment, lead their team in their own ways. As they get to know each other's true feelings, they gradually achieve perfect teamwork.

trailers.title: #더블플레이 고등학생 맞냐며.. 무슨 공이 던지는 족족 들어감;; 하지만 그 뒤에 가려진 태훈이의 속셈은? #쇼타임 #shortime #doubleplay
